programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: When Viktor Navorski (Tom Hanks), an Eastern European tourist, arrives at JFK in New York, war breaks out in his country, and he finds himself caught up in international politics. Because of the war, the Department of Homeland Security won't let him enter or exit the United States. He's trapped at JFK -- indefinitely. While living at the airport, Viktor falls for a flight attendant (Catherine Zeta-Jones). She may have feelings for him too. But what good is love if Viktor can't leave the terminal?

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Right Kind of Wrong
programme.desc: A stubborn idealist (Ryan Kwanten) spies a bride (Sara Canning) on her way to her wedding and immediately falls in love with her.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Rat Race
programme.desc: Pete Hammond Jr. (Tony Curtis) is a friendly saxophonist who leaves his life in Milwaukee to try and hit it big in New York City. When Pete arrives, he finds that music gigs are hard to come by, and he is forced to live in a dilapidated single-room apartment. He soon meets Peggy Brown (Debbie Reynolds), a talented performer who makes a living as a model and dancer. When Peggy is unable to pay her rent, she reluctantly accepts an offer from Pete to share his apartment.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: While racing toward the town of Red Rock in post-Civil War Wyoming, bounty hunter John "The Hangman" Ruth (Kurt Russell) and his fugitive prisoner (Jennifer Jason Leigh) encounter another bounty hunter (Samuel L. Jackson) and a man who claims to be a sheriff. Hoping to find shelter from a blizzard, the group travels to a stagecoach stopover located on a mountain pass. Greeted there by four strangers, the eight travelers soon learn that they may not make it to their destination after all.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: When Viktor Navorski (Tom Hanks), an Eastern European tourist, arrives at JFK in New York, war breaks out in his country, and he finds himself caught up in international politics. Because of the war, the Department of Homeland Security won't let him enter or exit the United States. He's trapped at JFK -- indefinitely. While living at the airport, Viktor falls for a flight attendant (Catherine Zeta-Jones). She may have feelings for him too. But what good is love if Viktor can't leave the terminal?

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Hunt to Kill
programme.desc: After U.S. Border Patrol officer Lee Davis (Eric Roberts) is killed in an explosion, his partner, Jim Rhodes (Steve Austin), quits the force and moves with his daughter, Kim (Marie Avgeropoulos), to the peaceful woods of Montana. Things heat up there, though, when a group of tough crooks led by the vicious Banks (Gil Bellows) kidnaps Kim and forces Rhodes to guide them through the wilderness. But while Rhodes may be outnumbered, he uses his knowledge of the terrain to take revenge on the thugs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wickensburg
programme.desc: When a mother and her young son move to a small town, they soon discover the town harbors a dark secret.

programme.title: Winnie Mandela
programme.desc: The story of South African politician Winnie Mandela (Jennifer Hudson).

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: Hunt to Kill
programme.desc: After U.S. Border Patrol officer Lee Davis (Eric Roberts) is killed in an explosion, his partner, Jim Rhodes (Steve Austin), quits the force and moves with his daughter, Kim (Marie Avgeropoulos), to the peaceful woods of Montana. Things heat up there, though, when a group of tough crooks led by the vicious Banks (Gil Bellows) kidnaps Kim and forces Rhodes to guide them through the wilderness. But while Rhodes may be outnumbered, he uses his knowledge of the terrain to take revenge on the thugs.

programme.title: Wickensburg
programme.desc: When a mother and her young son move to a small town, they soon discover the town harbors a dark secret.

programme.title: Winnie Mandela
programme.desc: The story of South African politician Winnie Mandela (Jennifer Hudson).

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: Love Shines
programme.desc: Canadian songwriter Ron Sexsmith makes a last-ditch effort to pen a hit.

programme.title: Stephen King's Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: After an abandoned textile mill reopens, several employees die; the deaths occur between 11 p.m. and 7 a.m. during the graveyard shift. A mill foreman assigns a group to clean the basement; the workers find a network of tunnels leading to a cemetery and an unknown creature.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hunt to Kill
programme.desc: After U.S. Border Patrol officer Lee Davis (Eric Roberts) is killed in an explosion, his partner, Jim Rhodes (Steve Austin), quits the force and moves with his daughter, Kim (Marie Avgeropoulos), to the peaceful woods of Montana. Things heat up there, though, when a group of tough crooks led by the vicious Banks (Gil Bellows) kidnaps Kim and forces Rhodes to guide them through the wilderness. But while Rhodes may be outnumbered, he uses his knowledge of the terrain to take revenge on the thugs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Poor Boy's Game
programme.desc: Boxer Donnie (Rossif Sutherland), jailed for nine years after causing brain damage to a boy he assaulted, is finally released. Donnie is regretful and wishes to move on, but the community is still tense with racial division. The impaired boy's black family wants revenge, and Donnie's white relatives are eager for a fight, so a boxing match with a powerful young black man (Flex Alexander) is scheduled. Amid the conflict, Donnie forms an unlikely friendship with his victim's father (Danny Glover).

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: An eight-year-old Amish boy witnesses a drug-related murder in a Philadelphia train station. The Philadelphia police captain discovers that the murderers are cops trying to squelch a corruption investigation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Poor Boy's Game
programme.desc: Boxer Donnie (Rossif Sutherland), jailed for nine years after causing brain damage to a boy he assaulted, is finally released. Donnie is regretful and wishes to move on, but the community is still tense with racial division. The impaired boy's black family wants revenge, and Donnie's white relatives are eager for a fight, so a boxing match with a powerful young black man (Flex Alexander) is scheduled. Amid the conflict, Donnie forms an unlikely friendship with his victim's father (Danny Glover).

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: Irish Republican Army member Fergus (Stephen Rea) forms an unexpected bond with Jody (Forest Whitaker), a kidnapped British soldier in his custody, despite the warnings of fellow IRA members Jude (Miranda Richardson) and Maguire (Adrian Dunbar). Jody makes Fergus promise he'll visit his girlfriend, Dil (Jaye Davidson), in London, and when Fergus flees to the city, he seeks her out. Hounded by his former IRA colleagues, he finds himself increasingly drawn to the enigmatic, and surprising, Dil.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Stephen King's Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: After an abandoned textile mill reopens, several employees die; the deaths occur between 11 p.m. and 7 a.m. during the graveyard shift. A mill foreman assigns a group to clean the basement; the workers find a network of tunnels leading to a cemetery and an unknown creature.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Though it is forbidden, a man devises a way to reunite with a long-lost love from the twin world that sits just above his own.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Shine of Rainbows
programme.desc: A lonely orphan's life is transformed by a woman who teaches him to conquer grief and discover the magic in nature and himself.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.desc: A stubborn idealist (Ryan Kwanten) spies a bride (Sara Canning) on her way to her wedding and immediately falls in love with her.

programme.title: The Right Kind of Wrong
programme.desc: A stubborn idealist (Ryan Kwanten) spies a bride (Sara Canning) on her way to her wedding and immediately falls in love with her.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Better Off Dead
programme.desc: Lane Meyer (John Cusack) is a teen with a peculiar family and a bizarre fixation with his girlfriend, Beth (Amanda Wyss). When Beth dumps Lane, he decides to kill himself, making bumbling attempts at suicide. Outside his morbid endeavors, Lane spends time with his oddball buddy, Charles (Curtis Armstrong), and befriends Monique (Diane Franklin), a visiting French student. Eventually, Lane resolves to race Beth's obnoxious new beau on the ski slopes, with unexpected results.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Though it is forbidden, a man devises a way to reunite with a long-lost love from the twin world that sits just above his own.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Snow Cake
programme.desc: Traveling through Canada, ex-con Alex Hughes (Alan Rickman) picks up a vivacious young hitchhiker, Vivienne (Emily Hampshire), who needs a ride to her hometown. Soon afterward, the pair are involved in a horrible car accident that kills Vivienne. Alex continues on to her home to tell Vivienne's mother (Sigourney Weaver) about her fate. Later he begins an affair with a neighbor (Carrie-Anne Moss) who paves the way for his healing.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: Better Off Dead
programme.desc: Lane Meyer (John Cusack) is a teen with a peculiar family and a bizarre fixation with his girlfriend, Beth (Amanda Wyss). When Beth dumps Lane, he decides to kill himself, making bumbling attempts at suicide. Outside his morbid endeavors, Lane spends time with his oddball buddy, Charles (Curtis Armstrong), and befriends Monique (Diane Franklin), a visiting French student. Eventually, Lane resolves to race Beth's obnoxious new beau on the ski slopes, with unexpected results.
